title: Business Analyst
required_skills: Minimum 3-5 years of experience as Business Analyst within the supply chain domain
Strong SQL proficiency for data querying and analysis
Prior working experience with SAP S/4HANA (MM, SD modules)
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills; ability to gather complex business requirements and translate into technical data needs
Demonstrated ability to translate business use cases into data visualisation prototypes (dashboard design)
Proficiency in creating detailed requirements documents, user stories, use cases, and functional specifications
3+ years of work experience with SAP Products
3+ years of work experience with SQL
bonus_skills: Experience with SAP S/4HANA validation and data quality
matched_skills: Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills — satisfies communication requirement (HSBC C-suite interface, stakeholder coordination)
Data visualisation: Power BI PL-300 certified; built C-suite dashboards at HSBC — partially satisfies dashboard design requirement
Requirements gathering and concept development: coordinated deliverables with stakeholders at Hapag-Lloyd — partial, non-technical match
missing_skills: No supply chain domain experience — explicitly required as primary domain context (3-5 years)
No SQL skills — hard requirement (3+ years explicitly listed as mandatory)
No SAP S/4HANA experience — hard requirement (3+ years, MM and SD modules explicitly required)
No business requirements documentation, user stories, or functional specifications experience in a technical BA context
No UAT coordination or test case definition for IT solutions
No dashboard wireframe/mock-up design experience (UX/UI focus)
core_responsibilities: Business requirements elicitation: collaborate with supply chain stakeholders to understand requirements and identify data needed for dashboards
Prioritise business requirements and dashboard features for maximum business impact
Partner with Data Analysts and SAP Functional consultants to validate data sources in SAP S/4HANA
Design professional dashboard mock-ups with UX/UI focus
Facilitate development, testing, and deployment of dashboards alongside Analytical Engineers
Define test cases and coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT)
recommended_emphasis: This role is not suitable — do not apply
The three hard requirements — supply chain domain, SQL (3+ years), and SAP S/4HANA (3+ years) — are all absent from the CV with no bridging experience
This is a technical BA role in a specific SAP ecosystem, not a generalist PMO or coordination role
summary: Poor match at 16.7%. This contract Business Analyst role has three hard technical requirements: supply chain domain expertise, 3+ years of SQL, and 3+ years of SAP S/4HANA (MM/SD) — none of which appear in the candidate's background. The candidate's communication and dashboard experience provide minimal generic overlap. Not recommended for application.
